Zero surprises: you control every change

From listing to resume in 30 seconds

HowItWorks.intro: FitMyCV uses AI to optimize your resume to match each job posting. It adapts the content to ATS format and generates a resume that passes ATS filters and lands you more interviews.
HowItWorks.title:
Upload your resume, paste a job posting,
get an AI-optimized resume.
HowItWorks.subtitle: A resume perfectly tailored to each posting, ready to send.

steps.label: PDF Import
steps.title: Upload your resume
steps.desc: Drag and drop your PDF or upload it. AI automatically extracts your skills, experience, and education in seconds.

steps.label: AI Generation
steps.title: AI Generation
steps.desc: Add job posting URLs. AI generates resume variants tailored to each target position.

steps.label: Review changes
steps.title: Review changes
steps.desc: View each AI-suggested change with a clear diff. Accept, reject, or adjust — you stay in full control.

steps.label: Match score
steps.title: Match score
steps.desc: A score evaluates the match between your resume and the target posting. See exactly where you can improve.

steps.label: Targeted optimization
steps.title: Targeted optimization
steps.desc: AI tells you exactly what to improve to boost your score. Select the suggestions that fit you and add your own notes.

steps.label: Final review
steps.title: Final review
steps.desc: Review the applied optimizations and watch your score climb. From 79 to 87 — every point counts.

steps.label: PDF / Word Export
steps.title: PDF / Word Export
steps.desc: Preview your finalized resume and export it in the format of your choice. Ready to send, perfectly formatted.

items.question: Will AI replace my content?
items.answer: No. The AI does not fabricate skills or experiences. It works exclusively from the information you provide: it rephrases, reorganizes, and optimizes content with ATS formatting in mind. The review mode lets you validate each change, and the online editor gives you full control over the final result.

items.question: Will my resume be ATS-compatible?
items.answer: Yes. The resume structure, keyword selection, and section hierarchy are designed to be correctly parsed by Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS). When your profile warrants it, the AI incorporates relevant terms from the job posting to strengthen the match with recruiter filters.

items.question: Is my data protected?
items.answer: Your resumes and personal data are encrypted and never shared with third parties or used to train AI models. You can delete your account and all your data at any time. FitMyCV complies with GDPR.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes. You receive 15 free credits when you create your account, with no credit card required. This lets you generate multiple resumes and test all features before purchasing additional credits.

items.question: Which job platforms are supported?
items.answer: FitMyCV works with any publicly accessible job posting that doesn't require authentication: Indeed, Welcome to the Jungle, France Travail, and many other platforms. Just paste the job URL. For sites requiring login (LinkedIn, etc.), a browser extension is available — it lets you generate a resume directly from the job page, using the source resume of your choice.

items.question: How is FitMyCV different from ChatGPT?
items.answer: If you ask ChatGPT to tailor your resume to a job posting, it will often make things up: a skill you don't have, a task you never performed, just to match the role. You notice it when proofreading — or worse, during an interview. Then you have to fix it, re-prompt, re-check… for every single application. FitMyCV works exclusively from your actual background and shows you every change before validation. The result: a faithful, optimized resume ready to send — in minutes, not hours.

items.question: What formats are supported?
items.answer: You can import an existing resume as a PDF via drag and drop. After generation or editing, export is available in PDF and Word (.docx), ready to be attached to an application or uploaded to a job platform.

items.question: How many resumes can I create?
items.answer: There is no limit. Each resume generation consumes credits. Upon registration, you receive 15 free credits to try the tool. After that, you purchase credits on demand based on your needs — no subscription, no commitment.

items.question: In how many languages can I create my resume?
items.answer: The interface and resume translation are currently available in 4 languages: French, English, Spanish, and German. More languages will be added progressively. You can translate an existing resume into another language with one click, preserving the layout and content.

items.question: Can I edit my resume after generation?
items.answer: Yes. The online editor lets you modify each section directly in the browser. The review mode displays AI suggestions as proposals that you can accept or reject individually before finalizing your resume.

items.question: What is the match score?
items.answer: It is a percentage indicator that measures the fit between your resume and a job posting. The algorithm compares your profile's skills, experience, and keywords against the position's requirements. Along with the score, targeted recommendations tell you how to improve the match.

Privacy.s8p1: FitMyCV.io uses artificial intelligence to generate and optimize your resumes. Your resume data (experience, skills, education) is transmitted to:
Privacy.s8p2: OpenAI states that data transmitted via its API is not used to train its models.
Privacy.s8_autoP: AI is used to calculate resume-job match scores, classify your skills, and suggest improvements. These processes are decision-support tools: you retain full control over the final content of your resumes.
Privacy.s9p1: Payments are processed by Stripe Payments Europe, Ltd. (Ireland). FitMyCV.io never stores complete credit card numbers.
Privacy.s10p1: Transactional emails (verification, password reset, confirmations) are sent via Resend.

Privacy.s12p1: We implement the following measures to protect your data:
s12Items: Resumes and personal data encrypted at rest (AES-256)
Anti-spam protection via Google reCAPTCHA v3
Privacy.s12p2: reCAPTCHA collects technical data (IP address, cookies, browsing behavior) to distinguish humans from bots. Google's <googlePrivacyLink>Privacy Policy</googlePrivacyLink> and Terms of Service apply.
Privacy.s13p1: FitMyCV offers a browser extension for Chrome, Edge, Brave, and Firefox that allows you to capture job offers directly from job boards.
s13_1Items: URLs of job offers you choose to capture
Text content of job offers (title, description, location) extracted from the visited page
Authentication token stored locally in the browser to maintain your session
s13_2Items: The extension does not collect any data outside of job offer pages where you actively click the "FitMyCV +" button
Extracted content is transmitted to our servers solely for CV generation and is processed in the same way as offers submitted through the website
Captured offers are temporarily stored in the browser's local storage until they are sent
No browsing history is collected or transmitted
Privacy.s13_3p1: The extension requires the following permissions: active tab access (to detect job offers), local storage (to save your offers and preferences), cookies (for authentication with your FitMyCV account).
Privacy.s14p1: Some data may be transferred outside the European Union (OpenAI, Resend in the United States). These transfers are governed by Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission.
Privacy.s15p1: This policy may be modified at any time. Changes will be published on this page with the update date. In the event of a substantial modification, you will be notified by email.

Showcase.title: Workflow
Showcase.subtitle: The complete 7-step journey: from PDF import to optimized resume export.

HowItWorksPage.metaTitle: How to Optimize Your Resume with AI — 7-Step Guide
HowItWorksPage.metaDescription: Learn how FitMyCV uses AI to tailor your resume to any job posting in 7 steps: import, analysis, optimization, and PDF/Word export.
HowItWorksPage.pageSubtitle: From importing your resume to exporting an optimized version, discover the complete 7-step process.
HowItWorksPage.intro: FitMyCV uses artificial intelligence to analyze your resume and tailor it to each job posting. The process is simple, fast, and you stay in full control of every change. Here's how to transform your resume into a powerful application tool.
HowItWorksPage.step1P1: Start by importing your existing resume as a PDF. Simply drag and drop your file or select it from your computer. The AI automatically analyzes the structure of your document and extracts your skills, work experience, education, and contact information.
HowItWorksPage.step1P2: The system recognizes different sections of your resume, even if they're presented in an unconventional format. Your data is structured and ready to be optimized in just seconds.
HowItWorksPage.step1P3: Once the import is complete, you'll find your entire background in an intuitive online editor. You can verify that all information was correctly extracted before moving to the next step.
HowItWorksPage.step2P1: Paste the link to the job posting you're targeting. The AI analyzes the posting's content: required skills, mentioned technologies, expected soft skills, and specific job requirements. Based on this analysis, it generates a version of your resume tailored to that specific posting.
HowItWorksPage.step2P2: You can target up to 10 job postings simultaneously. FitMyCV then generates 10 versions of your resume, each optimized for a different posting. Multi-posting processing runs in parallel for maximum time savings.
HowItWorksPage.step2P3: The AI never fabricates fictional content. It rephrases, reorganizes, and highlights your real skills based on what the recruiter is looking for. Your background remains true to reality.
HowItWorksPage.step3P1: Each AI-suggested change is presented as a diff, similar to a code review tool. You clearly see the before and after for each modified section: experience, skills, professional summary.
HowItWorksPage.step3P2: Accept, reject, or adjust each suggestion individually. You maintain full control over the final content of your resume. No change is applied without your explicit approval.
HowItWorksPage.step4P1: An algorithm evaluates the match between your resume and the targeted job posting. The score takes into account technical skills, relevant keywords, ATS structure, and the overall fit of your profile with the job requirements.
HowItWorksPage.step4P2: The score is displayed as a percentage with a category-by-category breakdown. You see exactly which aspects of your resume match the posting and which areas can be improved. Each optimization updates the score in real time.
HowItWorksPage.step5P1: The AI provides concrete recommendations to improve your match score. Each suggestion is ranked by impact (high, medium, low) and explains precisely what to add or modify in your resume.
HowItWorksPage.step5P2: Select the suggestions that match your real profile and add your own notes. The AI then regenerates the relevant sections incorporating your choices. Your match score increases with each applied optimization.
HowItWorksPage.step6P1: Review all applied optimizations and verify the final result. Your match score reflects all the improvements made. You can still adjust any section via the online editor.
HowItWorksPage.step6P2: This step lets you make sure your resume is exactly how you want it before export. Every change is traceable and reversible.
HowItWorksPage.step7P1: Preview your finalized resume in the format of your choice. Export is available in PDF and Word (.docx), ready to attach to an application or upload to a job platform.
HowItWorksPage.step7P2: The format is optimized for ATS systems: clean layout, readable fonts, standard structure. Your resume passes automated filters while remaining elegant and professional for human recruiters.
HowItWorksPage.ctaText: Create your free account and get 15 credits to test all features.

FeaturesPage.metaTitle: Features — AI Resume Generator with ATS Optimization
FeaturesPage.metaDescription: Discover all FitMyCV features: AI resume generation, ATS match score, targeted optimization, PDF/Word export, and more.
FeaturesPage.pageSubtitle: An AI resume generator built for your job applications. Every feature is designed to save you time and land more interviews.
FeaturesPage.category1Desc: From your existing resume to an optimized version for every job posting.
FeaturesPage.feat1Desc: Drag and drop your PDF resume. The AI automatically extracts your skills, work experience, education, and contact details. Your document's structure is analyzed and converted into editable data in seconds.
FeaturesPage.feat2Desc: Add up to 10 job posting links and generate as many tailored resume versions in parallel. Each version is optimized for a specific posting, with the keywords and structure expected by the recruiter.
FeaturesPage.feat3Desc: No link? Simply enter a job title and the AI generates a resume tailored to the typical profile sought for that role. Perfect for spontaneous applications.
FeaturesPage.feat4Desc: Launch a resume generation directly from the job posting page, without leaving your tab. Compatible with Chrome, Edge, Brave, and Firefox. Perfect for sites requiring authentication like LinkedIn.
FeaturesPage.category2Desc: The AI analyzes, compares, and guides you to maximize your chances.
FeaturesPage.feat5Desc: A percentage measures the fit between your resume and the targeted posting. The score breaks down the match by category: technical skills, experience, ATS keywords. Each optimization updates the score in real time.
FeaturesPage.feat6Desc: The AI rephrases your experiences with the terms expected by Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS). Structure, keywords, and section hierarchy are optimized to pass automated filters.
FeaturesPage.feat7Desc: The posting is automatically decoded: required skills, mentioned technologies, benefits, recruitment process. You see exactly what the recruiter is looking for.
FeaturesPage.feat8Desc: The AI tells you precisely what to improve to boost your score. Each recommendation is ranked by impact and explains exactly what to add or change. Select the ones that match your real profile.
FeaturesPage.category3Desc: You stay in full control of every change.
FeaturesPage.feat9Desc: Every AI change is presented as a diff. Accept, reject, or adjust each suggestion individually. No change is applied without your explicit approval.
FeaturesPage.feat10Desc: Edit every section of your resume directly in the browser. Experience, skills, education, summary — everything is editable in one click, with instant score updates.
FeaturesPage.feat11Desc: Travel back in time and restore a previous version of your resume in one click. Every change is automatically saved.
FeaturesPage.category4Desc: Export and translate your resume in the format and language of your choice.
FeaturesPage.feat12Desc: Export your finalized resume as PDF or Word (.docx). The format is optimized for ATS while remaining professional. Ready to attach to an application or upload to a job platform.
FeaturesPage.feat13Desc: Translate your resume into French, English, Spanish, or German in one click. Professional vocabulary is adapted for each language for a natural, idiomatic result.
FeaturesPage.feat14Desc: Launch a generation or translation and keep browsing. Your tasks run in the background and you're notified once they're done.
FeaturesPage.ctaText: 15 free credits on sign-up. No credit card required.

PricingPage.metaTitle: Pricing — Credits and Packs for Resume Optimization
PricingPage.metaDescription: Discover FitMyCV pricing: no subscription, pay only for what you use. 15 free credits on sign-up. Packs from 15 to 150 credits.
PricingPage.pageSubtitle: No subscription. No hidden fees. Pay only for what you use.
PricingPage.creditSystemP1: FitMyCV works with a credit system. Each AI action consumes a set number of credits. On sign-up, you receive 15 free credits to test all features — no credit card required.
PricingPage.creditSystemP2: Credits never expire and remain valid as long as your account is active. When your credits run out, you can purchase more on demand based on your needs.

PricingPage.packsSubtitle: Choose the pack that fits your needs.

faq.question: Do credits expire?
faq.answer: No. Your credits remain valid as long as your account is active. No time limit.

faq.question: Can I try for free?
faq.answer: Yes. You receive 15 free credits when you create your account, with no credit card required. That's enough to generate and optimize several resumes.

faq.question: Is there a subscription?
faq.answer: No. FitMyCV works without a subscription. You buy credits on demand, when you need them. No commitment.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: Payments are secured by Stripe. We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard), Apple Pay, Google Pay, and other payment methods depending on your location.

PricingPage.ctaText: No credit card required. Test all features.
